intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to establish a reusable, concrete envelope data model for annotations, justify it as the lynchpin of the system, and anchor its fields in familiar existing schemes so the design feels derived rather than invented.
novelty: It frames the envelope schema as a first-class board item destined for item_types/annotation.py and explicitly claims real-scheme grounding, though the grounding is not shown.
contribution: It preserves the design intent that a context-envelope schema should be concrete, grounded in existing schemes, and located in item_types/annotation.py, along with a link to its parent item.
